get.description: Public bootstrap: version, environment, feature flags for smart client shell.

post.description: Email + password; user must have ``hashed_password`` set (see migrations / admin tooling).

schema.title: Response Hello Api V1 Hello Get

get.description: List leads visible to this role; admin sees all, others only their own.

parameters.name: archived_only

schema.description: If true, only archived leads; if false (default), only active (non-archived)
schema.title: Archived Only

parameters.description: If true, only archived leads; if false (default), only active (non-archived)

parameters.name: deleted_only

schema.description: If true, soft-deleted leads (recycle bin) — admin only
schema.title: Deleted Only

parameters.description: If true, soft-deleted leads (recycle bin) — admin only

post.description: Take ownership of a lead in the shared pool (sets creator to you, clears in_pool).
Create a user (password login). Admin only — complements ``scripts/create_user.py`` for HTTP flows.

get.description: Leader-only; V1 returns only your own row until reporting lines are modeled.
Placeholder for INR 196 enrollment queue — empty until product adds persistence.
Admin training catalog placeholder — no persistence in V1.
Coaching panel data placeholder — admin and leader roles.
Admin activity feed placeholder (HTTP access logs are not queryable here yet).
Distinct from operational lead pool — purchase / billing stub.
Current user's balance and last few ledger lines.
Paginated ledger for self, or for another user when admin.

parameters.name: user_id

schema.description: Admin only: filter to this user
schema.title: User Id

parameters.description: Admin only: filter to this user

post.description: Admin-only credit/debit (signed amount_cents). Idempotent via idempotency_key.

get.description: Leads released into the pool (same list for admin and members; claim via ``POST /leads/{id}/claim``).
Scoped like ``GET /leads`` — only rows with ``status`` in lost/contacted and not archived.

parameters.name: open_only

schema.description: If true, only rows with completed_at IS NULL
schema.title: Open Only

parameters.description: If true, only rows with completed_at IS NULL

get.description: Pipeline-style view: leads grouped by ``status`` with the same visibility rules as ``GET /leads``.

schema.title: Response Health Db Health Db Get

intelligence.title: Intelligence
intelligence.description: When false, hide Work → Intelligence nav. Not a third-party AI integration flag.

ClientFeatures.title: ClientFeatures
ClientFeatures.description: Feature toggles the SPA should read once and cache (single source vs hardcoded UI).

lead_name.title: Lead Name
lead_name.description: Parent lead name at read time

due_at.title: Due At
due_at.description: Omit to leave unchanged; null clears due date

completed.title: Completed
completed.description: True = mark done now; False = reopen

archived.title: Archived
archived.description: True = archive now (sets archived_at); False = restore (clears archived_at)

in_pool.title: In Pool
in_pool.description: Admin only: release to shared pool (true) or remove from pool without assigning (false)

restored.title: Restored
restored.description: Admin only: true = undo soft-delete (clears deleted_at)

LoginRequest.title: LoginRequest
LoginRequest.description: Email kept as str so dev domains like ``@myle.local`` validate without DNS rules.

user_id.title: User Id
user_id.description: DB user id when JWT sub is numeric

email.title: Email
email.description: User email from JWT when present

MeResponse.title: MeResponse
MeResponse.description: Current session — populated from cookie JWT when present.

environment.title: Environment
environment.description: From APP_ENV — for badges, support, client logging.

auth_dev_login_enabled.title: Auth Dev Login Enabled
auth_dev_login_enabled.description: When true, SPA may show dev quick-login UI; production should be false.

TeamEnrollmentListResponse.title: TeamEnrollmentListResponse
TeamEnrollmentListResponse.description: Stub for future INR 196 enrollment workflow — always empty in V1.

TeamMemberCreate.title: TeamMemberCreate
TeamMemberCreate.description: Admin-only: create a user with password login (bcrypt stored server-side).

TeamMyTeamResponse.title: TeamMyTeamResponse
TeamMyTeamResponse.description: V1: only the authenticated user until org / reporting lines exist.

total.title: Total
total.description: All leads in scope with this status

items.title: Items
items.description: Newest in column, capped per limit_per_column

max_rows_fetched.title: Max Rows Fetched
max_rows_fetched.description: Cap applied when loading recent leads for bucketing
